versions.version_description: Complete chords including instrumental parts / info for playing with or without capo.
Better spacing and the correct lyrics.
Here's a playalong chord version that has improved chords for the verses.

This is a quite easy way with standard chord in standard tuning and it was a request of some Youtubers who saw this version. Sounds good pulling off the B string/1st fret and the G string 2nd fret. Unfortunately the Video is finally deleted in YT, so there is no video available. I will try to load it up again and do it with chord diagrams in the vid, because based on these chords you can do the solo quite easily, by adding some notes by staying in the chord progression.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
| [ch]D#m[/ch] | [ch]D#m[/ch] | [ch]B[/ch] | [ch]B[/ch] | [ch]C#[/ch] | [ch]C#[/ch] | [ch]B[/ch] | [ch]B[/ch] |

[Verse]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]
Nobody on the road[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]
Nobody on the beach[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
I feel it in the air[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
The summer's out of reach[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]
Empty lake, empty streets[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]
The sun goes down alone[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
I'm drivin' by your house[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
Though I know you're not at home[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
But I can see you[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]
Your brown skin shinin' in the sun[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]                                     [ch]B[/ch]
You got your hair combed back and your sunglasses on, baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]                     [ch]C#[/ch]
And I can tell you my love for you will still be strong[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]
After the boys of summer have gone[/tab]

[Solo]
| [ch]D#m[/ch] | [ch]D#m[/ch] | [ch]B[/ch] | [ch]B[/ch] | [ch]C#[/ch] | [ch]C#[/ch] | [ch]B[/ch] | [ch]B[/ch] |

[Verse]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]
I never will forget those nights[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]
Wonder if it was a dream[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
Remember how you made me crazy[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
Remember how I made you scream[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]
Now I don't understand what happened to our love[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
But babe, I'm gonna get you back[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
I'm gonna show you what I'm made of[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
I can see you[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]
Your brown skin shinin' in the sun[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]                            [ch]B[/ch]
I see you walking really slow smiling at everyone[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]                     [ch]C#[/ch]
And I can tell you my love for you will still be strong[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]
After the boys of summer have gone[/tab]

[Solo]
| [ch]B[/ch] | [ch]B[/ch] | [ch]B[/ch] | [ch]B[/ch] | (x2)
| [ch]D#m[/ch] | [ch]D#m[/ch] | [ch]B[/ch] | [ch]B[/ch] | [ch]C#[/ch] | [ch]C#[/ch] | [ch]B[/ch] | [ch]B[/ch] |

[Verse]
[tab][ch]D#m[/ch]
Out on the road today, I saw a Deadhead sticker on a Cadillac[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
A little voice inside my head said, don't look back, you can never look back[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]
I thought I knew what love was[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]
what did I know[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
Those days are gone forever[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
I should just let them go but[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
I can see you[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]
Your brown skin shinin' in the sun[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]                                    [ch]B[/ch]
You got that top pulled down and that radio on, baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]                     [ch]C#[/ch]
And I can tell you my love for you will still be strong[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]
After the boys of summer have gone[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
I can see you[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]
Your brown skin shinin' in the sun[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]                                       [ch]B[/ch]
You got that hair slicked back and those Wayfarers on, baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]                     [ch]C#[/ch]
And I can tell you my love for you will still be strong[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]
After the boys of summer have gone[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab]| [ch]F#[/ch] | [ch]C#[/ch] | [ch]C#[/ch] | [ch]B[/ch] | (x4)
(Fade on last repeat)[/tab]
